user.title: Set up HA-HEMS
user.description: HA-HEMS automatically discovers your solar panels, smart meter, home batteries, and EV chargers. Only fill in a field below if you want to manually force a specific entity — otherwise leave everything blank.

init.title: HA-HEMS thresholds
init.description: Tune the thresholds for solar-excess steering and tariff bands.

data.solar_excess_threshold: Start EV charging at solar excess (W)
data.solar_stop_threshold: Stop EV charging below solar excess (W)
